## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally with `claude --plugin-dir .`
- [ ] Validated with `/verify-flow` (for new agents, commands, skills)
- [ ] Hooks are inline only (`node -e "..."`) - no external script references
- [ ] Supports multiple languages where applicable (Kotlin, TypeScript, Python)
- [ ] Updated README.md and README-KR.md if needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive paths included
